Fields.Name: HP
Fields.Description: Durability until destruction (-1 Indestructible)

Fields.Name: Defence
Fields.Description: Attack power below this value is no damage

Fields.Name: External Texture ID
Fields.Description: mAA / mAA_ ????. Tpf (-1 None) (AA Area number)

Fields.Name: Material ID
Fields.Description: Material ID. Treated the same as the floor material. When -1, the same behavior as before

Fields.Name: Destruction Animation ID
Fields.Description: What is the animation destruction ID from 0 to what?

Fields.Name: Is Camera Hit
Fields.Description: Does the camera hit (0 not hit, 1 hit)

Fields.Name: Is Broken by Player Collision
Fields.Description: Broken when the player touches (0 no, 1)

Fields.Name: Is Animated Destruction
Fields.Description: Is it animation destruction (0 physical destruction, 1 animation destruction)

Fields.Name: Is Hit by Penetrating Bullets
Fields.Description: Will the penetrating bullet hit (0 not hit, 1 hit)

Fields.Name: Is Character Hit
Fields.Description: Does the character win (0 not hit, 1 hit)

Fields.Name: Cause Weapon Bounce
Fields.Description: Do you play the attack (0 do not play, 1 play)

Fields.Name: Is Disable Destruction on First Appearance
Fields.Description: Broken at the initial appearance of the player (0 ru, 1 no)

Fields.Name: Is Ladder
Fields.Description: Is it a ladder (0 different, 1 yes)

Fields.Name: Is Animation Paused in Cutscene
Fields.Description: Do you want to stop the animation during the poly play (0 not, 1 do)

Fields.Name: Is Damage No Hit
Fields.Description: No damage (0 hit, 1 not hit)

Fields.Name: Is Moving Object
Fields.Description: Is it a moving object (0 different, 1 yes)

Fields.Name: Is Rope Bridge
Fields.Description: Suspension bridge object (0 different, 1 yes)

Fields.Name: Is Rigid Body affected by Damage Blow
Fields.Description: Does the damage blow the rigid body (0 do not blow, 1 blow)

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed by Riding Character
Fields.Description: Will it break if the character gets on (0 it won't break 1 it will break)

Fields.Name: Is Flammable
Fields.Description: Will it burn (0 not, 1)

Fields.Name: Is Destroyed by Enemy Collision
Fields.Description: Broken when an enemy character touches (0 No, 1 Ru)

Fields.Name: Destruction - SFX ID
Fields.Description: SFXID when destroying an object (-1 default (810030))

Fields.Name: Destruction - Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: SFX generation position when the object is destroyed Damipoly ID (-1 placement position)

Fields.Name: Destruction - Bullet Behavior ID
Fields.Description: Action parameter of [bullet] at the time of destruction (-1 does not occur)

Fields.Name: Destruction - Bullet Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Location of [bullet] at the time of destruction Damipoli ID (-1 placement position)

Fields.Name: Fall Destruction Height
Fields.Description: Height at which the object breaks when dropped (0 does not break when dropped)

Fields.Name: Wind Effect Type - Pre-Destruction
Fields.Description: Wind effect type (before destruction)

Fields.Name: Wind Effect Type - Post-Destruction
Fields.Description: Wind effect type (after destruction)

Fields.Name: Camera Avoidance Type
Fields.Description: What to do if an object blocks between the camera and player

Fields.Name: Wind Coefficient - Pre-Destruction
Fields.Description: Wind coefficient (before destruction)

Fields.Name: Wind Coefficient - Post-Destruction
Fields.Description: Wind coefficient (after destruction)

Fields.Name: Destruction Stop time
Fields.Description: Time from destruction to forced stop of rigid body (do not force stop at 0)

Fields.Name: Burn Time
Fields.Description: Burning time (seconds) (continues to burn at 0)

Fields.Name: Burn Destruction Rate
Fields.Description: Burnup threshold for switching to the ruptured state

Fields.Name: Burn - SFX ID [0]
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of combustion 0 (-1 No SFX)

Fields.Name: Burn - SFX ID [1]
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of combustion 1 (-1 No SFX)

Fields.Name: Burn - SFX ID [2]
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of combustion 2 (-1 No SFX)

Fields.Name: Burn - SFX ID [3]
Fields.Description: SFX ID at the time of combustion 3 (-1 No SFX)

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Behavior ID [0]
Fields.Description: Bullet generation behavior parameter at the time of burning 0 (-1 does not occur)

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Behavior ID [1]
Fields.Description: Bullet generation behavior parameter at the time of burning 1 (-1 does not occur)

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Behavior ID [2]
Fields.Description: Bullet generation behavior parameter at the time of burning 2 (-1 does not occur)

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Behavior ID [3]
Fields.Description: Bullet generation behavior parameter at the time of burning 3 (-1 does not occur)

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Interval
Fields.Description: Interval (frame) to generate bullets for spreading fire

Fields.Name: Navimesh Flag
Fields.Description: Navigation mesh flag set from the object

Fields.Name: Collision Detection Type
Fields.Description: Collision detection type

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Generation Delay Time
Fields.Description: Time to delay the generation of bullets for fire spread (seconds)

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Generation Delay Time [0] (Minimum)
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Generation Delay Time [1] (Minimum)
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Generation Delay Time [2] (Minimum)
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Generation Delay Time [3] (Minimum)
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Generation Delay Time [0] (Maximum)
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Generation Delay Time [1] (Maximum)
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Generation Delay Time [2] (Maximum)
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Burn - Bullet Generation Delay Time [3] (Maximum)
Fields.Description: SFX generation delay time during combustion Randomly determined between start and end times

Fields.Name: Destruction AI Sound ID
Fields.Description: AI sound ID generated at the time of destruction

Fields.Name: Debris Fragments - Wait Time
Fields.Description: Material ID of debris (-1 Do not hide)

Fields.Name: Debris Fragments - Invisibility Time
Fields.Description: Time to hide debris (seconds)

Fields.Name: Rigid Body Collision - Soft
Fields.Description: Rigid body soft contact setting Collision point distance coefficient [soft]

Fields.Name: Rigid Body Collision - Normal
Fields.Description: Rigid soft contact setting Collision point distance coefficient [Normal]

Fields.Name: Rigid Body Collision - Hard
Fields.Description: Rigid soft contact setting Collision point distance coefficient [hard]

Fields.Name: Land Touch - SFX ID
Fields.Description: SFX ID at terrain contact (-1 offset by terrain material)

Fields.Name: Is Damage blocked after Passing Through
Fields.Description: Whether to pass the damage to the other side when receiving damage (0 pass, 1 do not pass)

Fields.Name: Paint Decal Size
Fields.Description: Paint decal target size (only powers of 0 to 4096 2 allowed)

Fields.Name: Dynamic Object Duration
Fields.Description: Time until dynamically generated Obj disappears after generation (0 does not disappear)

Fields.Name: Cloth Update Distance from Camera
Fields.Description: Distance from the camera to update havokCloth (0 always update)

Fields.Name: Player Touch - SE ID
Fields.Description: SE ID to play when touched by a local player operated by you (-1 Do not play)

Fields.Name: Landing Destruction - SFX ID
Fields.Description: Object material-dependent SFX identifier that regenerates when first landing after being destroyed (-1 does not occur)
